shows: Exterior storefront in a strip mall with illuminated 'SD BARBER SHOP' signage above the door and 'OPEN / HAIR-CUT' window lettering, parking lot in foreground

Row of barber styling chairs along a wood-paneled counter with mirrors, sinks, and product bottles at the workstations

Close-up of a finished fade haircut with sharp line-up, client in barber apron, shop interior blurred in background
Close-up of a custom shaved hair design (geometric undercut pattern) done at the shop, interior wall visible in background
